title: A method for mounting or unmounting a wind turbine component
abstract: A method for mounting or unmounting a wind turbine component (9, 10, 11) of a wind turbine (1) comprising a tower (2) and one or more nacelles (3) mounted on the tower (2), is disclosed. One or more cable guiding structures (29) comprising one or more pulleys (31) are mounted in an interior part of one of the nacelle(s) (3). At least one hoisting mechanism and a wind turbine component (9, 10, 11) to be mounted or unmounted are interconnected by means of a cable (32), via at least one of the pulleys (31) of at least one cable guiding structure (29). The wind turbine component (9, 10, 11) to be mounted or unmounted is moved, using the hoisting mechanism(s) and the cable(s) (32).
claims:
Claims 1. A method for mounting or unmounting a wind turbine component (9, 10, 11) of a wind turbine (1) comprising a tower (2) and one or more nacelles (3) mounted on the tower (2), the method comprising the steps of: mounting one or more cable guiding structures (29) in an interior part of one of the nacelle(s) (3), at least one cable guiding structure (29) comprising one or more pulleys (31), interconnecting at least one hoisting mechanism and a wind turbine component (9, 10, 11) to be mounted or unmounted by means of a cable (32), via at least one of the pulleys (31) of at least one cable guiding structure (29), moving the wind turbine component (9, 10, 11) to be mounted or unmounted using the hoisting mechanism(s) and the cable(s) (32). 2. A method according to claim 1, wherein the step of mounting one or more cable guiding structures (29) in an interior part of the nacelle (3) comprises attaching the cable guiding structure(s) (29) to a load carrying frame (30) of the nacelle (3). 3. A method according to claim 1 or 2, wherein at least two hoisting mechanisms are connected to the wind turbine component (9, 10, 11) to be mounted or unmounted by separate cables (32), and wherein the step of moving the wind turbine component (9, 10, 11) to be mounted or unmounted comprises coordinated operation of the at least two hoisting mechanisms. 4. A method according to any of the preceding claims, wherein said step of mounting one or more cable guiding structures (29) in an interior part of one of the nacelle(s) (3) comprises the step of: - mounting a first cable guiding structure (29) in an interior part of one of the nacelle(s) (3) next to said wind turbine component (9, 10, 11) and mounting a second cable guiding structure (29) in said interior part of one of the nacelle(s) (3) on an opposite side of said wind turbine component (9, 10, 11). 5. A method according to any of the preceding claims, wherein said steps are carried out such that said at least one of the pulleys is above said at least one hoisting mechanism and 

 above said wind turbine component (9, 10, 11), and said wind turbine component (9, 10, 11) is above said at least one hoisting mechanism. 6. A method according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the at least one hoisting mechanism is or comprises a winch. 7. A method according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the wind turbine component (9, 10, 11) is being unmounted, the method further comprising the step of detaching the wind turbine component (9, 10, 11) to be unmounted from the wind turbine (1). 8. A method according to any of claims 1-6, wherein the wind turbine component (9, 10, 11) is being mounted, the method further comprising the step of attaching the wind turbine component (9, 10, 11) to be mounted in the wind turbine (1). 9. A method according to any of the preceding claims, further comprising the step of removing the cable guiding structure(s) (29) when mounting or unmounting of the wind turbine component (9, 10, 11) has been completed. 10. A method according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the step of moving the wind turbine component (9, 10, 11) to be mounted or unmounted comprises lowering or hoisting the wind turbine component (9, 10, 11) through a hatch (7) provided in a floor of the nacelle (3). 11. A method according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the wind turbine component (9, 10, 11) to be mounted or unmounted is a drive train component. 12. A method according to any of the preceding claims, further comprising the steps of: mounting one or more sliding rails (15) in an interior part of the nacelle (3), - movably mounting at least one sledge (19) on each sliding rail (15), - attaching each sledge (19) to a wind turbine component (9, 10, 11) to be mounted or unmounted, and - moving the wind turbine component (9, 10, 11) to be mounted or unmounted along the sliding rail(s) (15) by means of the sledge(s) (19). 13. A method according to claim 12, wherein each sledge (19) comprises a guiding part (21) comprising a guiding track (22), the guiding part (21) being configured to be mounted movably on a sliding rail (15), and a mating part (25) comprising a protruding part (26) being arranged in engagement with the guiding track (22) of the guiding part (21), the mating part (25) being configured to be attached to a wind turbine component (9, 10, 11) to be mounted or unmounted, and wherein the method further comprises the step of adjusting an orientation of the wind turbine component (9, 10, 11) to be mounted or unmounted relative to the sliding rail(s) (15) by performing relative movements of the guiding part (21) and the mating part (25), and due to the protruding part (26) of the mating part (25) moving along the guiding track (22) of the guiding part (21). 14. A method according to claim 12 or 13, wherein the step of attaching each sledge (19) to a wind turbine component (9, 10, 11) to be mounted or unmounted comprises attaching each sledge (19) to an interface portion (24) on the wind turbine component (9, 10, 11) to be mounted or unmounted. 15. A method according to any of claims 12-14, wherein the step of mounting one or more sliding rails (15) in an interior part of the nacelle (3) comprises mounting at least two sliding rails (15) at a position below a centre of gravity of the wind turbine component (9, 10, 11) to be mounted or unmounted. 16. A method according to any of claims 12-15, wherein at least one of the sliding rail(s) (15) comprises two or more rail modules (6, 13, 14) being detachably connected to each other along a longitudinal direction of the sliding rail (15), and wherein the step of mounting one or more sliding rails (15) in an interior part of the nacelle (3) comprises the steps of: mounting a first rail module (6) of one or more sliding rails (15) on a wind turbine component (9, 10, 11), and - attaching at least a second rail module (13, 14) to the first rail module (6), thereby forming one or more sliding rails (15). 17. A method according to claim 16, wherein the step of mounting a first rail module (6) comprises attaching the rail module (6) to an interface portion (12) on the wind turbine component (9, 10, 11). 18. A method according to any of claims 12-17, further comprising the step of adjusting an inclination of each sliding rail (15), prior to moving the wind turbine component (9, 10, 11) to be mounted or unmounted. 19. A method according to any of claims 12-18, further comprising the step of dismantling the sliding rail(s) (15) when moving of the wind turbine component (9, 10, 11) to be mounted or unmounted has been completed. 20. A method according to any of the preceding claims, further comprising the steps of: - providing a movable container (39) housing the hoisting mechanism, and arranging the movable container (39) at a lower part of the tower (2), interconnecting the movable container (39) and at least one anchoring point (40) on the ground by means of at least one tag line (41), interconnecting the hoisting mechanism and at least one connecting point at the nacelle (3) by means of at least one cable (32), - hoisting the movable container (39) to a position at a lower part of the nacelle (3), using the hoisting mechanism and the tag line(s) (41), - mounting the movable container (39) at the lower part of the nacelle (3), - connecting the hoisting mechanism to a wind turbine component (9, 10, 11) to be mounted or unmounted, and moving the wind turbine component (9, 10, 11) by means of the hoisting mechanism and the tag line(s) (41). 21. A method according to claim 20, wherein the hoisting mechanism comprises at least two winches, and wherein the step of hoisting the movable container (39) comprises coordinated operation of the winches. 22. A wind turbine (1) comprising a tower (2) and one or more nacelles (3) mounted on the tower (2), wherein one or more cable guiding structures (29) is/are mounted in an interior part of the nacelle (3), at least one cable guiding structure (29) comprising one or more pulleys (31). 23. A wind turbine (1) according to claim 22, wherein the cable guiding structure(s) (29) is/are attached to a load carrying frame (30) of the nacelle (3). 24. A wind turbine (1) according to claim 22 or 23, wherein said at least one cable guiding structure(s) (29) is detachably mounted. 25. A wind turbine (1) according to any of claims 22-24 further comprising a wind turbine component (9, 10, 11) selected from the group consisting of a main bearing housing, a main shaft, a gearbox and a generator; in full or parts thereof. 26. A wind turbine (1) according to claim 25 comprising at least two cable guiding structure(s) (29), a first one next to a wind turbine component (9, 10, 11) and a second one on an opposite side of said wind turbine component (9, 10, 11). 27. A wind turbine (1) according to claim 25 or 26 further comprising at least one hoisting mechanism, wherein said one or more pulleys (31) is above said at least one hoisting mechanism and above said wind turbine component (9, 10, 11), and said wind turbine component (9, 10, 11) is above said at least one hoisting mechanism.
